List of all payments sku available in Application for default it is only one default no-ads sku: packageName +".noads"

getMaxConsentWaitTime() - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.splash.ISplashConfig
Max white time on first splash launch to fetch consent information from web services
getMaxInterstitialWaitTime() - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.splash.ISplashConfig
Max white time for load splash interstitial ad, it is start counting after consent operations are finished
getNetworkStatus() - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.main.ICoreViewModelsFactory
 
getNoAdsActive() - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.INoAds
Emits Flow<Boolean> indicating that no ads in-app purchase is or has changed to active or inactive Use this for behave with no ads related stuff, (e.g. hide/show no ads buy buttons)
getNoAdsActive() - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.IPaymentsRepo
Emits Flow<Boolean> indicating that no ads in-app purchase is or has changed to active or inactive Use this for behave with no ads related stuff, (e.g. hide/show no ads buy buttons)
getNoAdsActive() - Method in class pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.NoAdsNotAvailable
Emits Flow<Boolean> indicating that no ads in-app purchase is or has changed to active or inactive Use this for behave with no ads related stuff, (e.g. hide/show no ads buy buttons)
getNoAdsActive() - Method in class pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.Payments
Emits Flow<Boolean> indicating that no ads in-app purchase is or has changed to active or inactive Use this for behave with no ads related stuff, (e.g. hide/show no ads buy buttons)

M

makeNoAdsPayment(activity, noAdsSku) - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.INoAds
Makes call to current payment implementation to launch billing flow for an no ads in-app purchase. It will show the purchase screen to the user
makeNoAdsPayment(activity, noAdsSku) - Method in class pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.NoAdsNotAvailable
Makes call to current payment implementation to launch billing flow for an no ads in-app purchase. It will show the purchase screen to the user
makePurchase(activity, sku) - Method in interface pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.IPayments
Makes call to current payment implementation to launch billing flow for given String sku.
